title: Another Charm For Stables.
content:
Hang up hooks and shears to scare
    Hence the hag that rides the mare,
    Till they be all over wet
    With the mire and the sweat:
    This observ'd, the manes shall be
    Of your horses all knot-free.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Another Charm For Stables."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
